title: Morning Note ГғВўГӮВҖГӮВ” 0413
html:
Morning Note ГғВўГӮВҖГӮВ” 0413

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: Markets are so far shrugging off the no-deal outcome of the first round of ceasefire talks. This usually means they are still expecting potential good news to follow this week. Extreme headline mode is still on until further notice. Staying nimble in both directions remains the prudent path.

+ SPX tracker: The S&P is battling February levels, and milestones like the Supreme Court ruling against the Tariffs also mid February. The gaps from the rally last Tuesday are directly below current levels, and are first support zones in case of a dip. SPX chart is vulnerable to revisit 6645
Levels: Resistance at 6818, 6860, 6908, and 6943. Support at 6785, 6733, 6675, 6640, and 6585.
- Short term lines: ES_F | SPX

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 131313)

Nic

+ Key Talking Point:
вҖ” TOMORROW вҖ”
вҳ…вҳ… PPI
вҖ” Thu Apr 16 вҖ”
вҳ…вҳ… Industrial Production
вҳ…вҳ… Initial Jobless Claims

+ Earnings TABLE
Mon Apr 13: GS FAST | вҖ”
Tue Apr 14: JPM JNJ WFC C BLK | вҖ”
Wed Apr 15: ASML BAC MS PGR PNC MTB FHN | JBHT (KMI)
Thu Apr 16: TSM PEP ABT SCHW PLD BK USB MRSH TRV CFG WIT KEY | NFLX AA
Fri Apr 17: TFC FITB ERIC STT RF ALLY | (HDB IBN)

NOTE ID: 202604130438 | 0413
